meta: Heavy fabrication and assembly plant; overhead cranes, hot work, and machine-guarding hazards dominate.
Central distribution warehouse; forklift-pedestrian conflict and racking/manual-handling hazards.
Chemical blending and packaging unit; vapour exposure, flammable liquids, and process-safety hazards.
CNC machining and finishing plant; machine guarding, coolant exposure, and noise hazards.
High-throughput logistics hub; forklift-pedestrian hazards and shift-fatigue risk.
PCB assembly and electronics test; solder fume, ESD, and clean-room environmental controls.
Bulk chemical transfer and storage; PSM, vapour-cloud, pressure-system, and HAZMAT hazards.
Structural steel fabrication and pressure-vessel work; hot work, heavy lifting, and confined-space hazards.
Active civil construction site; working at heights, excavation, mobile plant, and subcontractor oversight.
Regional warehouse; forklift, racking-integrity, and manual-handling hazards.
Group corporate office; EHS governance, training oversight, and office/evacuation hazards.
